finding: Bronchopulmonary Sequestration — Others: renal anomaly, vertebral anomaly (DDx)

differentials.name: scimitar syndrome
differentials.raw: scimitar syndrome (with systemic supply to affected lung)

context: opaque hemithorax ± ipsilateral pleural effusion (if sequestration large) | ± air-fluid level | homogeneous well-circumscribed soft-tissue density mass (no bronchial communication) | lack of perfusion during pulmonary phase followed by rapid perfusion in systemic phase
